content: next/image onError requires a Client Component (function props cannot cross server/client serialization boundary). Common pitfall: onError paired with next/image lazy-loading/optimization can fail to fire reliably on already-cached broken images unless you also check img.complete && naturalWidth===0 on mount via ref, in addition to onError swapping src/state to a fallback. Standard pattern: wrap Image in a small 'use client' component holding an error boolean state, onError sets it true, render fallback UI (or fallback src) when true.
